message:
feat(wizard): clarify VPS account vs instance distinction

- Add transition AlertCard at end of rent-vps explaining the
  account vs server distinction using Netflix analogy
- Update create-vps header to clarify users are now creating
  the actual server within their account

Helps prevent confusion about password (account vs root) and
the two-step process of VPS setup.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -182,7 +182,8 @@ export default function CreateVPSPage() {

- Launch your VPS with password authentication. Follow the checklist below. + You have an account with your VPS provider. Now let's create the actual server + (the VPS instance) that will run your development environment.
